artifacts.title: Defenderofbasic receipt from 2025-01-18
artifacts.excerpt:
I had a visceral negative reaction to the thumbnail and premise of this video, especially given my agreement with @DefenderOfBasic's wonderful writing on the huge potential of large-scale internet-wide community notes initiatives...

But (as usual) Sabine makes some great points!… https://t.co/l4iSR8hFIR

artifacts.title: Defenderofbasic receipt from 2024-11-30

artifacts.title: Defenderofbasic receipt from 2024-09-03
artifacts.excerpt:
@DefenderOfBasic just wanna also say: i tweeted this on a whim after hearing someone correct themselves and remembering my own grievance with this distinction

before hitting send there was a voice in my head saying "this is a silly thing to tweet", but it was overpowered by YOUR voice on…

but can confirm this works there too! had a bit of a minor breakthrough earlier tonight in simply asking her about *her* knowledge/research !
